act1-rogue-trainee.name: Rogue Scout — Trainee
act1-rogue-trainee.lore: A fresh recruit of the Sisters of the Sightless Eye, supporting from afar with a basic shortbow.

act1-rogue-inner-sight.name: Rogue Scout — Inner Sight
act1-rogue-inner-sight.lore: Sister of Akara who reveals enemy weaknesses, lowering their defense.

act1-rogue-pierce.name: Rogue Scout — Pierce
act1-rogue-pierce.lore: A seasoned archer whose arrows pierce through to back-line targets.

act1-rogue-fire.name: Rogue Scout — Fire Arrow
act1-rogue-fire.lore: Anoints arrows with sacred flame, applying burn to all hit.

act1-rogue-cold.name: Rogue Scout — Cold Arrow
act1-rogue-cold.lore: Blesses arrows with frost, chilling targets on hit.

act2-blessed-aim.name: Desert Merc — Blessed Aim
act2-blessed-aim.lore: Aura: +50% attack rating for self and allies.

act2-prayer.name: Desert Merc — Prayer
act2-prayer.lore: Aura: regenerates 5% party HP per turn.

act2-defiance.name: Desert Merc — Defiance
act2-defiance.lore: Aura: +75% defense for self and allies.

act2-might.name: Desert Merc — Might
act2-might.lore: Aura: +50% physical damage for self and allies.

act2-holy-freeze.name: Desert Merc — Holy Freeze
act2-holy-freeze.lore: Aura: chills all enemies and adds cold damage.

act2-thorns.name: Desert Merc — Thorns
act2-thorns.lore: Aura: reflects a portion of melee damage back to attackers.

act3-iron-wolf-fire.name: Iron Wolf — Fire
act3-iron-wolf-fire.lore: An elemental mage of Kurast who hurls fireballs at the foe.

act3-iron-wolf-cold.name: Iron Wolf — Cold
act3-iron-wolf-cold.lore: An elemental mage of Kurast who controls the field with frost bolts and ice walls.

act3-iron-wolf-lightning.name: Iron Wolf — Lightning
act3-iron-wolf-lightning.lore: An elemental mage of Kurast who chains lightning through enemy ranks.

act3-iron-wolf-frozen-armor.name: Iron Wolf — Frozen Armor
act3-iron-wolf-frozen-armor.lore: Cloaks an ally in frozen plate, chilling melee attackers.

act3-iron-wolf-telekinesis.name: Iron Wolf — Telekinesis
act3-iron-wolf-telekinesis.lore: Knocks back enemies with kinetic force, disrupting casts.

act3-militia-pikeman.name: Militia — Pikeman
act3-militia-pikeman.lore: Last defender of fallen Kurast, fighting with an heirloom pike.

act3-militia-swordsman.name: Militia — Swordsman
act3-militia-swordsman.lore: A drilled guard with sword and shield, protecting the back line.

act4-paladin-initiate.name: Paladin Initiate
act4-paladin-initiate.lore: A young Zakarum acolyte channeling faith to shield allies.

act4-paladin-holy-fire.name: Paladin — Holy Fire
act4-paladin-holy-fire.lore: Aura: burns all enemies each turn.

act5-barbarian-recruit.name: Barbarian Recruit
act5-barbarian-recruit.lore: A guardian of Mount Arreat, facing demons with a two-handed sword.

act5-barbarian-battle-orders.name: Barbarian — Battle Orders
act5-barbarian-battle-orders.lore: Boosts the party's max HP and mana at the start of combat.

act5-barbarian-war-cry.name: Barbarian — War Cry
act5-barbarian-war-cry.lore: A thunderous shout that damages and stuns the enemy line.

tavern-thief-pickpocket.name: Thief — Pickpocket
tavern-thief-pickpocket.lore: A tavern recruit who steals gold from struck targets.

tavern-acolyte-priestess.name: Acolyte Priestess
tavern-acolyte-priestess.lore: A tavern healer who restores allies' HP each turn.
